# shouldCloseWithWindow

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether the web view should close when its window or host window closes.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var shouldCloseWithWindow: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

If [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], the web view should close; otherwise, it should not.

## Closing the View

- **close()**: Closes the web view when it’s no longer needed.
